mapper.sql: id, site_id, name, code, storage_type, is_default, config_json::text AS config_json, cdn_url, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_storage_configs WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_storage_configs ( site_id, name, code, storage_type, is_default, config_json, cdn_url, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{siteId}, #{name}, #{code}, #{storageType}, #{isDefault}, #{configJson}::jsonb, #{cdnUrl}, #{status}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_storage_configs SET del_flag = '1', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
